title: Entergy to report second-quarter 2022 financial results on Aug. 3
text: NEW ORLEANS , July 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Entergy will report its second-quarter 2022 financial results before the market opens Wednesday, Aug. 3. Leo Denault, chairman and chief executive officer, Drew Marsh, executive vice president and chief financial officer, and company leaders invite you to listen to a live webcast discussion of Entergy's financial results at 10 a.m.

title: ETR vs. CNP: Which Stock Should Value Investors Buy Now?
text: ETR vs. CNP: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?

title: Entergy (ETR) to Harden Power Grid Against Storms, Cut Outages
text: Entergy (ETR) discloses the grid hardening and resilience filing plan to reduce power outages and plans to invest in infrastructure to provide services even during extreme weather conditions.
